title: Config.tools entry missing from Config.allowed_tools is a configuration conflict — error_occurred + agent_stopped reason='error'
description: Cross-field coherence. If a Config.tools entry's name is not also in Config.allowed_tools, the supervisor has declared an RPC tool while simultaneously forbidding its exposure. The runner MUST detect this at startup, emit error_occurred, and stop with reason='error' before any model turn runs.

forbidden_events.label: no model turn may run when startup validation fails
no tool may be invoked when startup validation fails
